macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Meta reportedly hires four more OpenAI researchers
items.summary: A new report says Meta has hired four additional researchers from OpenAI, continuing its aggressive push to recruit top AI talent. The development highlights intensifying competition among major AI labs for frontier model expertise.

items.title: OpenAI’s ChatGPT experienced a service outage
items.summary: Users reported that ChatGPT was down and prompts were failing to load, indicating a temporary reliability issue affecting the service. The report underscores ongoing operational challenges even for leading AI products.

items.title: Apple reportedly plans to open up its underlying AI models
items.summary: A report indicates Apple may begin making its underlying AI models more accessible, suggesting a possible shift in how the company integrates and exposes its AI technology. If confirmed, the move would mark a notable development in Apple’s AI strategy.

items.title: Nvidia and Fei-Fei Li back Generalist’s $400 million robotics round
items.summary: AI robotics company Generalist raised $400 million at a reported $2 billion valuation, with participation from Nvidia’s NVentures, Fei-Fei Li, Bezos Expeditions, and others. The company said the funding will support new models, more physical data, and expanded training infrastructure for AI robotics.

items.title: New machine learning papers continue to appear on arXiv
items.summary: arXiv’s recent machine learning listings include work on adaptive learning rates, TD(0) convergence, nonlinear constraints, and other topics, showing continued active research output across core ML subfields. These postings reflect ongoing academic momentum rather than a single major product announcement.

items.title: Commentary notes concern over Anthropic’s latest coding-speed findings
items.summary: A recent AI commentary piece discusses Anthropic’s new blog and the interpretation of its coding speed-up results, which some readers have taken as evidence against an AI performance wall. The post suggests the results should not be overread as settling the broader debate.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
